titleStmt.title: SII 25.130A: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 130A. (A.R. No. 130A of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the first prākāra of the Agastyēśvara shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

The details of the date of the record viz., year 2, Dhanus 11, śu 10, Wednesday may be equated with 1218 A.D., November 3, f.d.t. ·14, in which case it was Dhanus 3 and not 11 as recorded in the epigraph or with 1239 A.D., December 7. In either case, the king may be identified with one of the first two Māṟavaṟman Sundara-pāṇḍya's.

It states that Poṉpaṟṟiyuḍaiyāṉ Moṇṇaippirāṉ Aḻagapperumāḷ alias Viḻuppādarāyar of Pullūr, a naḍuviṟ-kūṟu of Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam purchased the lands including nattam, garden, tank, etc., at Iḷaiyāttikkuḍippaṟṟu in Kalavāyi-nāḍu as tirunandavaṉappuṟa-iṟaiyili from Kaṇḍan Udaiyañ-Cheydāṉ alias Kāṅgēyaṉ, for the maintenance of the persons rearing the flower garden called Maṉamperiyāṉ-tirunandavaṉam. The person who purchased the above lands is stated to have maintained the garden from out of the income from taxes such as kaḍamai, antarāyam, kaṟpūra-vilai, kāriyavārāṭchi, veṭṭipāṭṭam, pañjupili, sandivikkiragappēṟu, marakkalam, taḍippadakku besides the produce of different crops (as specified) raised in the various seasons in the lands measured by 24 foot-span named kuḍitāṅgi-kōl. The document was attested by the chief Kaṇḍaṉ Udayañcheydāṉ alias Kāṅgēyaṉ and Eḻukaḻikāma-mūvēndavēlāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāyk keḻvikkumel tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2ṇṭāvatu dhanu nāyaṟṟu 10 1 tiyatiyum pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum
buyan kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeśan=tirupputtūr Uṭaiyār tirutta(ḷ)ḷiyāṇṭa ṉāyaṉāṟkuk kaṇṭanutaiyañceytāṉāṉa kāṅke
yaṉen miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟṟuppullūṟ kuṭippoṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ moṇṇaippirāṉ Aḻakapperumāḷāṉa viḻuppātarāyar Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkuc ceyvitta
maṉamperiyāṉ tirunan=tavaṉattu tirunandavaṉañ ceyyumavarkaḷukku pocaṉa muṉṉiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Ivaneṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya kalavāyiṉāṭṭu Iḷai
yāttikkuṭippaṟṟil nilam terināṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparappum Uṭpaṭṭa ṉilam nāyaṉār cuntarapāṇṭiya devaṟku yā
ṇṭu 2 vatu mutal tirunandavaṉappuṟam Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu kaṭamai koḷḷumiṭattu Iṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭiye kaṭamai Antarāyam kaṟpūravilai kāriyavārāṭ
ci veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟu marakkalam taṭippataṟku maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Irupattu nālaṭiyāṉ kuṭitāṅkieṉṉum kolāl nilam
Aḷantu payir pāṟtu viḷaiñcanilattukku māttāl mukkalanellum patiṉāṟu meṉi Oru tiramamum Aṟpacikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivaricaiyilo
nṟumukkālum cittiraikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivaricaiyil Oṉṟu pātiyum tulā viḷaittu viḷainta nilattukku Ivaricaiyil Oṉṟu kālum Eḷtiṉai varaku
viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Oṉṟum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal kaikoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittu
koḷvatu Ippaṭikku kaṇṭanutaiyañ ceytāṉāṉa kāṅkeyaṉ Eḻuttu § var (eḻu kaḻi muventa veṟāṉ Eḻuttu § kā^2^
Digital edition of SII 25.130A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
